title: Lead Instructional Designer at American Institute

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at American Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Instructional Designer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
